title: YTPMV - The Last Days Of Sting Chameleon
description:
Well, I've been wanting to do another YTPMV, but I couldn't single out a good source to use, despite having several songs to chose from. I ended up deciding on this earlier today, so I pumped this one out rather quickly. At any rate, enjoy some Megaman music combined with a Megaman fan video.

The backing song is from Megaman X and is Sting Chameleon's Stage music.

DISCLAIMER: I don't own any of these clips. This video does not represent the opinions of the original creators of these clips. I am not profiting from their use in any way.
